Perform a strict senior-level review focused on correctness, security, resilience, and long-term maintainability. Flag bugs, edge cases, concurrency issues, API contract risks, validation gaps, error handling weaknesses, performance bottlenecks, and test coverage gaps. Check for insecure patterns, secret leakage, injection vectors, privilege/auth flaws, unsafe dependencies, and backward compatibility issues. Recommend concise, production-ready fixes prioritized by severity and impact.
